ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the sighting */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the sighting occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the sighting occurred */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sighting occurred */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the aerial phenomenon */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the sighting in seconds */,
  "duration_hours_minutes" TEXT /* Duration of the sighting in hours and minutes */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or description of the sighting */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the sighting was reported */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sighting */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the sighting */,
  "day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month of the sighting */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week of the sighting */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day of the sighting */,
  "weekend" INTEGER /* Whether the sighting occurred on a weekend */,
  "decade" INTEGER /* Decade of the sighting */,
  "us_holiday" TEXT /* Whether the sighting occurred on a US holiday */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the sighting */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the sighting has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the sighting was verified */,
  "verification_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the verification process */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sighting report (e.g., eyewitness, video, photo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_shape FOREIGN KEY ("shape") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_duration_seconds FOREIGN KEY ("duration_seconds") REFERENCES durations ("duration_seconds"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape (e.g., cylinder, light) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the shape (e.g., geometric, organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the sighting in seconds */,
  "duration_hours_minutes" TEXT /* Duration of the sighting in hours and minutes */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the sighting in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the location is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address or specific location within the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_latitude FOREIGN KEY ("latitude") REFERENCES sightings ("latitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sighting */,
  "century" TEXT /* Century in which the year occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES sightings ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the sighting (e.g., October, January) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the month (e.g., spring, summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_months_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES sightings ("month")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_month" (
  "day_of_month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day of the month */,
  "day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the month of the sighting (e.g., 1, 15) */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_of_month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_days_of_month_day_of_month FOREIGN KEY ("day_of_month") REFERENCES sightings ("day_of_month")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_week" (
  "day_of_week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day of the week */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week of the sighting (e.g., Monday, Friday) */,
  "holiday" TEXT /* Whether the day is a holiday in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_of_week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_days_of_week_day_of_week FOREIGN KEY ("day_of_week") REFERENCES sightings ("day_of_week")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day of the sighting (e.g., 10, 20) */,
  "part_of_day" TEXT /* Part of the day (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hours_hour FOREIGN KEY ("hour") REFERENCES sightings ("hour")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekends" (
  "weekend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekend status */,
  "weekend" INTEGER /* Whether the sighting occurred on a weekend (True or False) */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekends_weekend FOREIGN KEY ("weekend") REFERENCES sightings ("weekend")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade" INTEGER /* Decade of the sighting (e.g., 1940, 1950) */,
  "century" TEXT /* Century in which the decade occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decades_decade FOREIGN KEY ("decade") REFERENCES sightings ("decade")
)

CREATE TABLE "us_holidays" (
  "us_holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each US holiday status */,
  "us_holiday" TEXT /* Whether the sighting occurred on a US holiday (e.g., None, Thanksgiving) */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("us_holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_us_holidays_us_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("us_holiday") REFERENCES sightings ("us_holiday")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sighting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sighting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
